title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Algorithm Workbench
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a defended multi-structure dispatch system while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate operation frequency, scale, latency, memory, and consistency needs into structure criteria.
Combine structures while documenting duplicated state and synchronization invariants.
Present loop invariants, induction, or contradiction arguments appropriate to each component.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
